name: warp
description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
readme_excerpt: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal. Use Warp's built-in coding agent, or bring your own CLI agent (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and others).

name: free-claude-code
description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
readme_excerpt: Use Claude Code CLI, VS Code, JetBrains ACP, or chat bots through your own Anthropic-compatible proxy.

name: TradingAgents
description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
readme_excerpt: - [2026-04] **TradingAgents v0.2.4** released with structured-output agents (Research Manager, Trader, Portfolio Manager), LangGraph checkpoint resume, persistent decision log, DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM/Azure provider support, Docker, and a Windows UTF-8 encoding fix. See CHANGELOG.md for the full list. - [2026-03] **TradingAgents v0.2.3** released with multi-language support, GPT-5.4 family models, unified model catalog, backtesting date fidelity, and proxy support. - [2026-03] **TradingAgents v0.2.2**…

name: skills
description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
readme_excerpt: My agent skills that I use every day to do real engineering - not vibe coding.

name: ml-intern
description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
readme_excerpt: An ML intern that autonomously researches, writes, and ships good quality ML related code using the Hugging Face ecosystem — with deep access to docs, papers, datasets, and cloud compute.

name: superpowers
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
readme_excerpt: Superpowers is a complete software development methodology for your coding agents, built on top of a set of composable skills and some initial instructions that make sure your agent uses them.

description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers

name: craft-agents-oss
readme_excerpt: To understand what Craft Agents does and how it works watch this video.

name: ds2api
description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
readme_excerpt: 将 DeepSeek Web 对话能力转换为 OpenAI、Claude 与 Gemini 兼容 API。后端为 **Go 全量实现**，前端为 React WebUI 管理台（源码在 webui/，部署时自动构建到 static/admin）。

name: public-apis
description: A collective list of free APIs
readme_excerpt: The Public APIs repository is manually curated by community members like you and folks working at APILayer. It includes an extensive list of public APIs from many domains that you can use for your own products. Consider it a treasure trove of APIs well-managed by the community over the years.

name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
readme_excerpt: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

name: Pixelle-Video
description: 🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine

name: maigret
description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
readme_excerpt: **Maigret** collects a dossier on a person **by username only**, checking for accounts on a huge number of sites and gathering all the available information from web pages. No API keys required.

name: cua
description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
readme_excerpt: Drive any native macOS app **in the background** — agents click, type, and verify without stealing the cursor, focus, or Space, even on non-AX surfaces like Chromium web content and canvas-based tools (Blender, Figma, DAWs, game engines). Use with the CLI or MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor, and custom clients. Every session records as a replayable trajectory.

name: GhostTrack
description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number
readme_excerpt: Useful tool to track location or mobile number, so this tool can be called osint or also information gathering

name: Open-Generative-AI
description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

name: quarkdown
description: 🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.
readme_excerpt: Your upvote shows your support and helps Quarkdown reach more people 💚

name: FinceptTerminal
description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
readme_excerpt: State-of-the-art financial intelligence platform with CFA-level analytics, AI automation, and unlimited data connectivity.

name: ghostty
description: 👻 Ghostty is a fast, feature-rich, and cross-platform terminal emulator that uses platform-native UI and GPU acceleration.
